title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹14,500 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Assam 1000 20 Yield 2. Bihar 1200 09 Yield 1200 Re-issue of 7.72% Bihar SGS 2041, issued on February 25, 2026 Price 3. Chhattisgarh 500 10 Yield 500 22 Yield 4. Kerala 1800 23 Yield 5. Madhya Pradesh 1600 08 Yield 1200 22 Yield 6. Uttar Pradesh 2000 10 Yield 2500 Re-issue of 7.6
